---
name: New skill request
about: Propose a new skill for the marketplace
labels: new-skill
---

## Skill name

<!-- kebab-case, domain-prefixed. e.g., `wordpress-speed-audit` -->

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- One sentence from the user's perspective. e.g., "I want to audit Core Web Vitals without running a full SEO audit." -->

## Trigger phrases

<!-- How would a user ask for this? List 3–5 natural phrasings.
e.g.:
- "check my page speed"
- "why is my site slow"
- "Core Web Vitals audit"
-->

## Proposed deliverable

<!-- What does the user get at the end? e.g., "Prioritized list of performance fixes with estimated impact." -->

## Agents needed

<!-- Which existing agents would this invoke? Would any new agents be required?
See the shared agent list in README.md.
-->

## Why not extend an existing skill?

<!-- e.g., "wordpress-design already audits performance but doesn't go deep on CWV or provide fix-level detail." -->
